visual_description: A man wearing a white shirt and large black headphones is looking intently at a computer screen in a dimly lit room. The camera cuts to another man in a dark suit and tie, who is also looking at a screen and appears to be on a phone call. The scene alternates between the two men, both focused on their respective screens.
audio_description: The audio consists of dramatic, suspenseful music with a fast tempo, creating a tense atmosphere.
